queries.question: For every cinematographer, show me the corresponding tool names.
queries.sql: select cinematographers.name , tools.toolname from Cinematographers_Tools join Tools on Cinematographers_Tools.toolId = Tools.id join Cinematographers on Cinematographers_Tools.cinematographerId = Cinematographers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?toolname WHERE {
  ?cinematographers_tools a :Cinematographers_Tools .
  ?tools a :Tools .
  ?cinematographers_tools p:hasTools ?tools .
  ?cinematographers a :Cinematographers .
  ?cinematographers_tools p:hasCinematographers ?cinematographers .
  ?cinematographers p:name ?name .
  ?tools p:toolName ?toolname .
}

queries.question: Show me the tool name that is common for all cinematographers.
queries.sql: SELECT Tools.toolName  from Cinematographers_Tools join Tools on Cinematographers_Tools.toolId = Tools.id join Cinematographers on Cinematographers_Tools.cinematographerId = Cinematographers.id   GROUP BY Cinematographers_Tools.toolId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Cinematographers_Tools.cinematographerId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Cinematographers)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Which tool names are associated with each cinematographer?
